{ "name": "@vue/reactivity", "version": "3.1.5", "description": "@vue/reactivity", "main": "index.js", "module": "dist/reactivity.esm-bundler.js", "types": "dist/reactivity.d.ts", "unpkg": "dist/reactivity.global.js", "jsdelivr": "dist/reactivity.global.js", "files": [ "index.js", "dist" ], "sideEffects": false, "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git+https://github.com/vuejs/vue-next.git", "directory": "packages/reactivity" }, "buildOptions": { "name": "VueReactivity", "formats": [ "esm-bundler", "esm-browser", "cjs", "global" ] }, "keywords": [ "vue" ], "author": "Evan You", "license": "MIT", "bugs": { "url": "https://github.com/vuejs/vue-next/issues" }, "homepage": "https://github.com/vuejs/vue-next/tree/master/packages/reactivity#readme", "dependencies": { "@vue/shared": "3.1.5" } }
